front.title: Downgrade Prevention for the Internet Key Exchange Protocol Version 2 (IKEv2)

abstract.t:
This document specifies an extension to the Internet Key Exchange protocol version 2 (IKEv2) in which the peers authenticate the full IKE_SA_INIT transcript. When both peers implement the extension and at least one relevant authentication credential is not compromised, this prevents certain downgrade attacks on IKEv2.
This document updates RFC 7296.
